parsed.production_notes: The video features real human actors in a natural home setting with realistic lighting and camera work, indicating it is entirely human-recorded.

characters.appearance: A South Asian woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and fair complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair tied back in a low ponytail. Her facial features are soft, with dark eyes and a small bindi on her forehead.
characters.wardrobe: A shimmering pink saree with a short-sleeved pink blouse. She wears small gold hoop earrings and a simple gold bangle on her right wrist.
characters.demeanor: Initially appears dutiful and reserved, but becomes confident, assertive, and proud as she explains her newfound skills.

characters.appearance: A South Asian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a slim build and a light brown complexion. He has dark, styled hair, a short beard and mustache, and wears dark-rimmed glasses. He has several beaded bracelets on his right wrist.
characters.wardrobe: A brown, button-up, long-sleeved kurta-style shirt and white trousers.
characters.demeanor: Initially condescending and skeptical, he becomes surprised, impressed, and then enthusiastic.

scenes.setting: A brightly lit, modern home kitchen. The countertops are black granite, and the walls are a neutral beige. A blue chimney hood is visible above the stove.

panels.panel_visual_description: In a home kitchen, Character A, a woman in a pink saree, is in the foreground, turned slightly to her right, wiping a black countertop with a cloth. Her expression is serious and focused. Behind her and slightly out of focus stands Character B, a man in a brown shirt and glasses, holding and counting paper currency. The lighting is bright and comes from an overhead source. The background is a simple beige wall.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot in a kitchen. Character A is in the foreground cleaning a counter while Character B stands behind her, offering her money for household expenses. She refuses, stating she has her own money from teaching English, which he scoffs at. Captions in Hindi and English appear at the bottom of the screen, synchronized with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ये लो, इस महीने के सामान का खर्च। [Here, this is for this month's expenses.]

Character A says: इट्स ओके, आप रख लो, मेरे पास है। [It's okay, you keep it, I have money.]

Character B says: अरे, तुम्हारे पास पैसे कहां से आए? [Hey, where did you get money from?]

Character A says: मैं आजकल मोहल्ले के बच्चों का इंग्लिश ट्यूशन ले रही हूं और यह मेरी पहली कमाई है। [These days I'm giving English tuitions to the neighborhood kids, and this is my first earning.]

Character B says: तुम्हें खुद टूटी-फूटी इंग्लिश आती है, तुम क्या सिखा पाओगे? [You yourself know broken English, what will you be able to teach?]

scenes.setting: A living room with beige walls. The characters are sitting on a patterned fabric couch. A white decorative mask hangs on the wall behind them.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B are sitting next to each other on a couch in a living room. Character B, on the left, holds a smartphone and looks at Character A with a surprised expression. Character A, on the right, looks at him and speaks assertively, gesturing with her right hand to make a point. A white decorative mask is visible on the beige wall behind them. The lighting is soft and even.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shifts to the living room where both characters are seated on a couch. Character A confidently speaks in English and explains that she learned using the 'SpeakX' app's AI teacher. Character B is initially shocked, then impressed by the app's effectiveness and low cost. He decides to try it himself. Captions in English and Hindi appear at the bottom, highlighting key phrases from their conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently. I don't need any help in understanding anything. I used to be a topper in my school and I can contribute better to my family with a job.

Character B says: अरे, इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे सीखी? [Hey, how did you learn such good English?]

Character A says: मैंने SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड किया है। इसके AI इंग्लिश टीचर के साथ जब तुम ऑफिस जाते थे, प्रैक्टिस करती थी। और दो हफ्तों में मेरी इंग्लिश फर्स्ट क्लास हो गई है। और अब मैं कभी भी इंग्लिश में बात कर सकती हूं। [I downloaded the SpeakX app. With its AI English teacher, I used to practice when you went to the office. And in two weeks, my English became first-class. And now I can talk in English anytime.]

Character B says: AI? कितने पैसे खर्च हुए इसपे? [AI? How much money was spent on this?]

Character A says: एक कप चाय से भी कम। [Less than a cup of tea.]

Character B says: क्या बात कर रही है? फिर तो मैं आज ही इसे ट्राई करूंगा। मुझे भी ऑफिस में इंग्लिश काम आएगा। कब तक एक ही सैलरी पे रहूंगा। [What are you saying? Then I'll try it today itself. English will be useful for me in the office too. How long will I remain on the same salary?]

scenes.setting: The same living room, with the character on the couch.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits alone on the patterned couch, facing the camera directly with a friendly and engaging smile. She is in the center of the frame. She gestures with her hands as she speaks. The background consists of the beige wall and the couch's backrest. The lighting is bright and focused on her.

scenes.visual_description: Character A breaks the fourth wall and speaks directly to the viewer. She encourages them to download the 'SpeakX' app to learn English fluently in two weeks. On-screen text captions her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: क्या आप भी मेरी तरह सबको चौंकाना चाहते हैं? तो आज ही SpeakX इंस्टॉल करो और दो हफ्ते में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलो। [Do you also want to surprise everyone like me? Then install SpeakX today and speak fluent English in two weeks.]
